en_title: Persona 4 Revival Reveals February 2027 Release Date
cn_title: 《女神异闻录4：复兴版》定档2027年2月
subtitle: 经典重制，焕然一新
opus_summary: 《女神异闻录4：复兴版》在Xbox游戏展示会上宣布将于2027年2月18日发售。重制版全面升级视觉、UI、战斗和事件，标准版售价69.99美元(约合人民币500元)，预购已开启。

paragraphs.en: Persona 4 Revival snuck into the Xbox Games Showcase 2026 to confirm it has a release date of February 18, 2027.
paragraphs.cn: 《女神异闻录4：复兴版》悄然亮相2026年Xbox游戏展示会，确认其发售日期为2027年2月18日。

paragraphs.en: It’s a schedule update for Atlus’ yellow-tinted RPG that came with a nice, long look at gameplay. Considering it’s been nearly 18 years since the studio first launched the original game, fans are more than familiar with its characters and story, but today’s footage also revealed a fresh coat of paint with updated visuals.
paragraphs.cn: 这是Atlus这款黄色调RPG的日程更新，并附带了一段相当长的实机演示。距离该工作室首次推出原版游戏已近18年，粉丝们对其角色和故事早已烂熟于心，但今天的画面也展示了焕然一新的视觉升级。

paragraphs.en: "Persona 4 Revival is the perfect starting point for newcomers to the series!" an official description from its website said. "Visuals, UI, battles, and events - all reimagined for the modern era. Welcoming to newcomers, yet fresh for fans of the original."
paragraphs.cn: 「《女神异闻录4：复兴版》是系列新玩家的完美起点！」其官网的官方描述写道，「视觉、UI、战斗和事件——全部为现代时代重新构想。对新玩家友好，对原版粉丝来说又充满新鲜感。」

paragraphs.en: With the launch of its latest trailer, Atlus and Sega have opened up pre-orders for players on Xbox Series X | S and Xbox on PC, revealing standard ($69.99), deluxe ($84.99), and premium ($99.99) editions to purchase. Steam and PlayStation 5 pre-orders go live at an unspecified point tomorrow, June 8.
paragraphs.cn: 随着最新预告片的发布，Atlus和世嘉已面向Xbox Series X|S和Xbox PC玩家开启预购，推出了标准版（69.99美元(约合人民币500元)）、豪华版（84.99美元(约合人民币610元)）和高级版（99.99美元(约合人民币720元)）。Steam和PlayStation 5版预购将于明天（6月8日）某个时间点开启。

paragraphs.en: Persona 4 Revival was announced at last year's Xbox Games Showcase. Atlus has been pretty quiet when it comes to information about its new remake, but let's hope that, with a release date now locked in, we'll learn more in the months ahead.
paragraphs.cn: 《女神异闻录4：复兴版》是在去年的Xbox游戏展示会上公布的。Atlus对其新重制版的信息一直相当沉默，但希望随着发售日期的确定，我们能在未来几个月内了解更多。

paragraphs.en: Persona 4 Revival launches in February of next year for PC, PlayStation 5, and Xbox Series X | S. It's also coming to Xbox Game Pass. If you need to catch up on all of the biggest reveals, you can check out everything announced at the Xbox Games Showcase 2026 .
paragraphs.cn: 《女神异闻录4：复兴版》将于明年2月登陆PC、PlayStation 5和Xbox Series X|S，同时也会加入Xbox Game Pass。如果你想了解所有重大发布，可以查看2026年Xbox游戏展示会上公布的全部内容。

audit_issues.detail: opus_summary must be 70-80 non-space characters, got 89

audit_failure_reason: [summary_length] opus_summary must be 70-80 non-space characters, got 89
